sqlMap.select: SELECT DF.FILE_ID, CASE #primary# WHEN '1' THEN DF.FILE_NAME1 ELSE DF.FILE_NAME2 END FILE_NAME, DF.FOLDERFILE_TYPE, DF.FOLDER_TYPE, DF.FILE_PATH, DF.FILE_SIZE, DF.FILE_EXT, DF.FOLDER_PATH, DF.OWNER_ID, DF.USE_STATUS, DF.CREATE_ID, CASE #primary# WHEN '1' THEN DF.CREATE_NAME1 ELSE DF.CREATE_NAME2 END CREATE_NAME, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(DF.CREATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS CREATE_DATE, DF.UPDATE_ID, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(DF.UPDATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS UPDATE_DATE, DF.TYPE_ID, FT2.TYPE_NAME, FT2.TYPE_ICON, CASE WHEN FV.USER_ID IS NULL THEN '0' ELSE '1' END FAVORITE_STATUS, S.SHARER_ID, '' AS SHARER_NAME, GROUP_CONCAT(S.USER_ID) AS USER_LIST, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(S.SHARE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS SHARE_DATE, S.SUB_STATUS, S.TENANT_ID FROM ( SELECT D.FOLDER_ID AS FILE_ID, D.FOLDER_NAME1 AS FILE_NAME1, D.FOLDER_NAME2 AS FILE_NAME2, 'D' AS FOLDERFILE_TYPE, D.FOLDER_TYPE, '' AS FILE_PATH, '' AS FILE_SIZE, FT.FILE_EXT, D.FOLDER_PATH, D.OWNER_ID, D.USE_STATUS, D.CREATE_ID, D.CREATE_NAME1, D.CREATE_NAME2, D.CREATE_DATE, D.UPDATE_ID, D.UPDATE_DATE, FT.TYPE_ID, D.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER AS D JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILETYPE AS FT ON FT.FILE_EXT = 'folder' AND D.TENANT_ID = FT.TENANT_ID UNION SELECT F.FILE_ID AS FILE_ID, F.FILE_NAME AS FILE_NAME1, F.FILE_NAME AS FILE_NAME2, 'F' AS FOLDERFILE_TYPE, D2.FOLDER_TYPE, F.FILE_PATH, F.FILE_SIZE, F.FILE_EXT, D2.FOLDER_PATH, D2.OWNER_ID, F.USE_STATUS, F.CREATE_ID, F.CREATE_NAME1, F.CREATE_NAME2, F.CREATE_DATE, F.UPDATE_ID, F.UPDATE_DATE, F.TYPE_ID, F.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE AS F JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER AS D2 ON F.FOLDER_ID = D2.FOLDER_ID AND F.TENANT_ID = D2.TENANT_ID ) AS DF JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILETYPE FT2 ON DF.TYPE_ID = FT2.TYPE_ID AND DF.TENANT_ID = FT2.TENANT_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FAVOR AS FV ON DF.FILE_ID = FV.TARGET_ID AND DF.FOLDERFILE_TYPE = FV.TARGET_TYPE AND DF.TENANT_ID = FV.TENANT_ID AND FV.USER_ID = #userId# JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_SHARE AS S ON S.FOLDERFILE_ID = DF.FILE_ID AND S.FOLDERFILE_TYPE = DF.FOLDERFILE_TYPE AND S.TENANT_ID = DF.TENANT_ID WHERE DF.USE_STATUS = 'Y' AND DF.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# GROUP BY S.FOLDERFILE_ID, S.FOLDERFILE_TYPE, S.SHARER_ID HAVING SHARER_ID = #userId# ORDER BY FOLDERFILE_TYPE, FILE_NAME LIMIT #startPoint#, #pageSize#

SELECT DISTINCT DF.FILE_ID, CASE #primary# WHEN '1' THEN DF.FILE_NAME1 ELSE DF.FILE_NAME2 END FILE_NAME, DF.FOLDERFILE_TYPE, DF.FOLDER_TYPE, DF.FILE_PATH, DF.FILE_SIZE, DF.FILE_EXT, DF.FOLDER_PATH, DF.OWNER_ID, DF.USE_STATUS, DF.CREATE_ID, CASE #primary# WHEN '1' THEN DF.CREATE_NAME1 ELSE DF.CREATE_NAME2 END CREATE_NAME, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(DF.CREATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS CREATE_DATE, DF.UPDATE_ID, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(DF.UPDATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS UPDATE_DATE, DF.TYPE_ID, FT2.TYPE_NAME, FT2.TYPE_ICON, CASE WHEN FV.USER_ID IS NULL THEN '0' ELSE '1' END FAVORITE_STATUS, S.SHARER_ID, CASE #primary# WHEN '1' THEN U.DISPLAYNAME ELSE U.DISPLAYNAME2 END SHARER_NAME, ( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(USER_ID ORDER BY SEQ_ID) FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_SHARE WHERE FOLDERFILE_ID = S.FOLDERFILE_ID AND FOLDERFILE_TYPE = S.FOLDERFILE_TYPE AND SHARER_ID = S.SHARER_ID ) AS USER_LIST, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(S.SHARE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS SHARE_DATE, S.SUB_STATUS, S.TENANT_ID FROM ( SELECT D.FOLDER_ID AS FILE_ID, D.FOLDER_NAME1 AS FILE_NAME1, D.FOLDER_NAME2 AS FILE_NAME2, 'D' AS FOLDERFILE_TYPE, D.FOLDER_TYPE, '' AS FILE_PATH, '' AS FILE_SIZE, FT.FILE_EXT, D.FOLDER_PATH, D.OWNER_ID, D.USE_STATUS, D.CREATE_ID, D.CREATE_NAME1, D.CREATE_NAME2, D.CREATE_DATE, D.UPDATE_ID, D.UPDATE_DATE, FT.TYPE_ID, D.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER AS D JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILETYPE AS FT ON FT.FILE_EXT = 'folder' AND D.TENANT_ID = FT.TENANT_ID UNION SELECT F.FILE_ID AS FILE_ID, F.FILE_NAME AS FILE_NAME1, F.FILE_NAME AS FILE_NAME2, 'F' AS FOLDERFILE_TYPE, D2.FOLDER_TYPE, F.FILE_PATH, F.FILE_SIZE, F.FILE_EXT, D2.FOLDER_PATH, D2.OWNER_ID, F.USE_STATUS, F.CREATE_ID, F.CREATE_NAME1, F.CREATE_NAME2, F.CREATE_DATE, F.UPDATE_ID, F.UPDATE_DATE, F.TYPE_ID, F.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE AS F JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER AS D2 ON F.FOLDER_ID = D2.FOLDER_ID AND F.TENANT_ID = D2.TENANT_ID ) AS DF JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILETYPE FT2 ON DF.TYPE_ID = FT2.TYPE_ID AND DF.TENANT_ID = FT2.TENANT_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FAVOR AS FV ON DF.FILE_ID = FV.TARGET_ID AND DF.FOLDERFILE_TYPE = FV.TARGET_TYPE AND DF.TENANT_ID = FV.TENANT_ID AND FV.USER_ID = #userId# JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_SHARE AS S ON S.FOLDERFILE_ID = DF.FILE_ID AND S.FOLDERFILE_TYPE = DF.FOLDERFILE_TYPE AND S.TENANT_ID = DF.TENANT_ID JOIN TBL_USERMASTER AS U ON S.SHARER_ID = U.CN AND S.TENANT_ID = U.TENANT_ID WHERE DF.USE_STATUS = 'Y' AND S.USER_ID IN
#idList[]#
AND DF.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# ORDER BY FOLDERFILE_TYPE, FILE_NAME LIMIT #startPoint#, #pageSize#

SELECT UU.FOLDERFILE_TYPE, COUNT(UU.FOLDERFILE_TYPE) AS COUNT FROM ( SELECT DF.FILE_ID, CASE #primary# WHEN '1' THEN DF.FILE_NAME1 ELSE DF.FILE_NAME2 END FILE_NAME, DF.FOLDERFILE_TYPE, DF.FOLDER_TYPE, DF.FILE_PATH, DF.FILE_SIZE, DF.FILE_EXT, DF.FOLDER_PATH, DF.OWNER_ID, DF.USE_STATUS, DF.CREATE_ID, CASE #primary# WHEN '1' THEN DF.CREATE_NAME1 ELSE DF.CREATE_NAME2 END CREATE_NAME, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(DF.CREATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS CREATE_DATE, DF.UPDATE_ID, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(DF.UPDATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS UPDATE_DATE, DF.TYPE_ID, FT2.TYPE_NAME, FT2.TYPE_ICON, CASE WHEN FV.USER_ID IS NULL THEN '0' ELSE '1' END FAVORITE_STATUS, S.SHARER_ID, '' AS SHARER_NAME, GROUP_CONCAT(S.USER_ID) AS USER_LIST, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(S.SHARE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS SHARE_DATE, S.SUB_STATUS, S.TENANT_ID FROM ( SELECT D.FOLDER_ID AS FILE_ID, D.FOLDER_NAME1 AS FILE_NAME1, D.FOLDER_NAME2 AS FILE_NAME2, 'D' AS FOLDERFILE_TYPE, D.FOLDER_TYPE, '' AS FILE_PATH, '' AS FILE_SIZE, FT.FILE_EXT, D.FOLDER_PATH, D.OWNER_ID, D.USE_STATUS, D.CREATE_ID, D.CREATE_NAME1, D.CREATE_NAME2, D.CREATE_DATE, D.UPDATE_ID, D.UPDATE_DATE, FT.TYPE_ID, D.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER AS D JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILETYPE AS FT ON FT.FILE_EXT = 'folder' AND D.TENANT_ID = FT.TENANT_ID UNION SELECT F.FILE_ID AS FILE_ID, F.FILE_NAME AS FILE_NAME1, F.FILE_NAME AS FILE_NAME2, 'F' AS FOLDERFILE_TYPE, D2.FOLDER_TYPE, F.FILE_PATH, F.FILE_SIZE, F.FILE_EXT, D2.FOLDER_PATH, D2.OWNER_ID, F.USE_STATUS, F.CREATE_ID, F.CREATE_NAME1, F.CREATE_NAME2, F.CREATE_DATE, F.UPDATE_ID, F.UPDATE_DATE, F.TYPE_ID, F.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE AS F JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER AS D2 ON F.FOLDER_ID = D2.FOLDER_ID AND F.TENANT_ID = D2.TENANT_ID ) AS DF JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILETYPE FT2 ON DF.TYPE_ID = FT2.TYPE_ID AND DF.TENANT_ID = FT2.TENANT_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FAVOR AS FV ON DF.FILE_ID = FV.TARGET_ID AND DF.FOLDERFILE_TYPE = FV.TARGET_TYPE AND DF.TENANT_ID = FV.TENANT_ID AND FV.USER_ID = #userId# JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_SHARE AS S ON S.FOLDERFILE_ID = DF.FILE_ID AND S.FOLDERFILE_TYPE = DF.FOLDERFILE_TYPE AND S.TENANT_ID = DF.TENANT_ID WHERE DF.USE_STATUS = 'Y' AND DF.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# GROUP BY S.FOLDERFILE_ID, S.FOLDERFILE_TYPE, S.SHARER_ID HAVING SHARER_ID = #userId# ) AS UU GROUP BY UU.FOLDERFILE_TYPE

SELECT UU.FOLDERFILE_TYPE, COUNT(UU.FOLDERFILE_TYPE) AS COUNT FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT DF.FILE_ID, CASE #primary# WHEN '1' THEN DF.FILE_NAME1 ELSE DF.FILE_NAME2 END FILE_NAME, DF.FOLDERFILE_TYPE, DF.FOLDER_TYPE, DF.FILE_PATH, DF.FILE_SIZE, DF.FILE_EXT, DF.FOLDER_PATH, DF.OWNER_ID, DF.USE_STATUS, DF.CREATE_ID, CASE #primary# WHEN '1' THEN DF.CREATE_NAME1 ELSE DF.CREATE_NAME2 END CREATE_NAME, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(DF.CREATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS CREATE_DATE, DF.UPDATE_ID, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(DF.UPDATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS UPDATE_DATE, DF.TYPE_ID, FT2.TYPE_NAME, FT2.TYPE_ICON, CASE WHEN FV.USER_ID IS NULL THEN '0' ELSE '1' END FAVORITE_STATUS, S.SHARER_ID, CASE #primary# WHEN '1' THEN U.DISPLAYNAME ELSE U.DISPLAYNAME2 END SHARER_NAME, ( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(USER_ID ORDER BY SEQ_ID) FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_SHARE WHERE FOLDERFILE_ID = S.FOLDERFILE_ID AND FOLDERFILE_TYPE = S.FOLDERFILE_TYPE AND SHARER_ID = S.SHARER_ID ) AS USER_LIST, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(S.SHARE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS SHARE_DATE, S.SUB_STATUS, S.TENANT_ID FROM ( SELECT D.FOLDER_ID AS FILE_ID, D.FOLDER_NAME1 AS FILE_NAME1, D.FOLDER_NAME2 AS FILE_NAME2, 'D' AS FOLDERFILE_TYPE, D.FOLDER_TYPE, '' AS FILE_PATH, '' AS FILE_SIZE, FT.FILE_EXT, D.FOLDER_PATH, D.OWNER_ID, D.USE_STATUS, D.CREATE_ID, D.CREATE_NAME1, D.CREATE_NAME2, D.CREATE_DATE, D.UPDATE_ID, D.UPDATE_DATE, FT.TYPE_ID, D.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER AS D JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILETYPE AS FT ON FT.FILE_EXT = 'folder' AND D.TENANT_ID = FT.TENANT_ID UNION SELECT F.FILE_ID AS FILE_ID, F.FILE_NAME AS FILE_NAME1, F.FILE_NAME AS FILE_NAME2, 'F' AS FOLDERFILE_TYPE, D2.FOLDER_TYPE, F.FILE_PATH, F.FILE_SIZE, F.FILE_EXT, D2.FOLDER_PATH, D2.OWNER_ID, F.USE_STATUS, F.CREATE_ID, F.CREATE_NAME1, F.CREATE_NAME2, F.CREATE_DATE, F.UPDATE_ID, F.UPDATE_DATE, F.TYPE_ID, F.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE AS F JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER AS D2 ON F.FOLDER_ID = D2.FOLDER_ID AND F.TENANT_ID = D2.TENANT_ID ) AS DF JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILETYPE FT2 ON DF.TYPE_ID = FT2.TYPE_ID AND DF.TENANT_ID = FT2.TENANT_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FAVOR AS FV ON DF.FILE_ID = FV.TARGET_ID AND DF.FOLDERFILE_TYPE = FV.TARGET_TYPE AND DF.TENANT_ID = FV.TENANT_ID AND FV.USER_ID = #userId# JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_SHARE AS S ON S.FOLDERFILE_ID = DF.FILE_ID AND S.FOLDERFILE_TYPE = DF.FOLDERFILE_TYPE AND S.TENANT_ID = DF.TENANT_ID JOIN TBL_USERMASTER AS U ON S.SHARER_ID = U.CN AND S.TENANT_ID = U.TENANT_ID WHERE DF.USE_STATUS = 'Y' AND S.USER_ID IN
#idList[]#
AND DF.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# ) AS UU GROUP BY UU.FOLDERFILE_TYPE

SELECT CASE #primary# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END AS DISPLAYNAME FROM ( SELECT CN, DISPLAYNAME, DISPLAYNAME2, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_USERMASTER UNION SELECT CN, DISPLAYNAME, DISPLAYNAME2, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER ) AS A WHERE CN IN
#idList[]#
AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# ORDER BY DISPLAYNAME

SELECT DISTINCT USER_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDERUSER FU JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER F ON FU.FOLDER_ID = F.FOLDER_ID AND FU.TENANT_ID = F.TENANT_ID WHERE F.FOLDER_TYPE = 'D' AND FU.CREATE_ID = #userId# AND FU.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

SELECT DISTINCT USER_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDERUSER FU JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER F ON FU.FOLDER_ID = F.FOLDER_ID AND FU.TENANT_ID = F.TENANT_ID WHERE F.FOLDER_TYPE = 'D' AND FU.CREATE_ID = #userId# AND FU.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM tbl_webfolder_share WHERE FOLDERFILE_ID = #folderFileId# AND FOLDERFILE_TYPE = #folderFileType# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT (IFNULL(MAX(CONVERT(SEQ_ID, UNSIGNED INTEGER)) , 0) + 1) FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_SHARE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_WEBFOLDER_SHARE ( SEQ_ID, USER_ID, USER_TYPE, FOLDERFILE_ID, FOLDERFILE_TYPE, CREATE_ID, CREATE_DATE, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #seqId#, #userId#, #userType#, #folderFileId#, #folderFileType#, #createId#, NOW(), #tenantId# )
sqlMap.select:
SELECT TU.DEPARTMENT FROM TBL_USERMASTER TU WHERE 1=1 AND TU.CN = #userId# AND TU.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
AND TU.DEPARTMENT NOT IN ($notInDept$)
UNION
SELECT TA.DEPTID FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER TA WHERE 1=1 AND TA.CN = #userId# AND TA.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
AND TA.CN NOT IN ($notInDept$)
SELECT TD.DEPT_CD_PATH FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER TD WHERE TD.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9 = #userId# AND TD.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

SELECT TD.CN FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER TD WHERE 1=1 AND TD.DEPT_CD_PATH LIKE CONCAT(#deptCdPath#,'%') AND TD.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
AND TD.CN NOT IN ($notInDept$)

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT distinct FOLDER.FOLDER_id AS TRASHCAN_ID, FOLDER.FOLDER_NAME1 AS TRASHCAN_NAME, FOLDER.FOLDER_PATH AS TRASHCAN_PATH, FILE_TYPE.TYPE_ICON AS TRASHCAN_ICON_URL, 'folder' AS TRASHCAN_EXT, 0 AS TRASHCAN_SIZE, DATE_ADD(FOLDER.CREATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS CREATE_DATE, DATE_ADD(FOLDER.UPDATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS UPDATE_DATE, FOLDER.CREATE_NAME1 AS CREATE_NAME1, FOLDER.CREATE_NAME2 AS CREATE_NAME2, '' AS FILE_FOLDER_ID, FOLDER.FOLDER_UPPER as FOLDER_UPPER FROM tbl_webfolder_folder AS FOLDER INNER JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILETYPE as FILE_TYPE ON FILE_TYPE.TYPE_NAME = 'folder' WHERE FOLDER.USE_STATUS = 'T' AND FOLDER.DELETER_ID = #userId# AND FOLDER.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
'folder' LIKE CONCAT ('%', #searchExt#, '%')
FOLDER.FOLDER_NAME1 LIKE CONCAT ('%', #searchFileName#, '%')
FOLDER.CREATE_NAME1 LIKE CONCAT ('%', #searchCreateName#, '%')
(DATE_FORMAT(FOLDER.CREATE_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') >= #endrollStartDate# AND DATE_FORMAT(FOLDER.CREATE_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d')<= #endrollEndDate#)
(DATE_FORMAT(FOLDER.UPDATE_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') >= #delStartDate# AND DATE_FORMAT(FOLDER.UPDATE_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d')<= #delEndDate#)
UNION
SELECT distinct FILES.FILE_id AS TRASHCAN_ID, FILES.FILE_NAME AS TRASHCAN_NAME, FILES.FILE_PATH AS TRASHCAN_PATH, FILE_TYPE.TYPE_ICON AS TRASHCAN_ICON_URL, FILES.FILE_EXT AS TRASHCAN_EXT, FILES.FILE_SIZE AS TRASHCAN_SIZE, DATE_ADD(FILES.CREATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS CREATE_DATE, DATE_ADD(FILES.UPDATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS UPDATE_DATE, FILES.CREATE_NAME1 AS CREATE_NAME1, FILES.CREATE_NAME1 AS CREATE_NAME2, FILES.FOLDER_ID AS FILE_FOLDER_ID, '' as FOLDER_UPPER FROM tbl_webfolder_file AS FILES INNER JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILETYPE as FILE_TYPE ON FILE_TYPE.TYPE_ID = FILES.TYPE_ID WHERE FILES.USE_STATUS = 'T' AND FILES.DELETER_ID = #userId# AND FILES.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
FILES.FILE_EXT LIKE CONCAT ('%', #searchExt#, '%')
FILES.FILE_NAME LIKE CONCAT ('%', #searchFileName#, '%')
FILES.CREATE_NAME1 LIKE CONCAT ('%', #searchCreateName#, '%')
FILES.CREATE_DATE >= #endrollStartDate# AND FILES.CREATE_DATE <= #endrollEndDate#)
FILES.UPDATE_DATE >= #delStartDate# AND FILES.UPDATE_DATE <= #delEndDate#)
) R GROUP BY R.TRASHCAN_ID ORDER BY R.UPDATE_DATE DESC LIMIT #pStart#, #pEnd#

SELECT distinct FILES.FILE_id AS TRASHCAN_ID, FILES.FILE_NAME AS TRASHCAN_NAME, FILES.FILE_PATH AS TRASHCAN_PATH, FILE_TYPE.TYPE_ICON AS TRASHCAN_ICON_URL, FILES.FILE_EXT AS TRASHCAN_EXT, FILES.FILE_SIZE AS TRASHCAN_SIZE, DATE_ADD(FILES.CREATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS CREATE_DATE, DATE_ADD(FILES.UPDATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS UPDATE_DATE, FILES.CREATE_NAME1 AS CREATE_NAME1, FILES.CREATE_NAME1 AS CREATE_NAME2, FILES.FOLDER_ID AS FILE_FOLDER_ID, "" as FOLDER_UPPER FROM jmocha.tbl_webfolder_file AS FILES INNER JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILETYPE as FILE_TYPE ON FILE_TYPE.TYPE_ID = FILES.TYPE_ID WHERE FILES.USE_STATUS = 'T' AND FILES.DELETER_ID = #userId# AND FILES.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND FILES.FOLDER_ID = #folderId#
SELECT FOLDER.FOLDER_PATH FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER AS FOLDER where FOLDER.FOLDER_ID = #folderId# AND FOLDER.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE SET USE_STATUS = 'N' WHERE FILE_ID = #fileId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
UPDATE TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER SET USE_STATUS = 'N' WHERE FOLDER_PATH LIKE CONCAT(#folderPath#, '%') AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId#

UPDATE TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE f JOIN ( SELECT * FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER WHERE FOLDER_PATH LIKE CONCAT(#folderPath#, '%') AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId# ) AS d ON f.FOLDER_ID = d.FOLDER_ID AND f.TENANT_ID = d.TENANT_ID SET f.USE_STATUS = 'N' WHERE f.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND f.USE_STATUS = 'T'
sqlMap.select: SELECT distinct FOLDER.FOLDER_ID AS TRASHCAN_ID, FOLDER.FOLDER_NAME1 AS TRASHCAN_NAME, FOLDER.FOLDER_PATH AS TRASHCAN_PATH, FILE_TYPE.TYPE_ICON AS TRASHCAN_ICON_URL, 'folder' AS TRASHCAN_EXT, 0 AS TRASHCAN_SIZE, DATE_ADD(FOLDER.CREATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS CREATE_DATE, DATE_ADD(FOLDER.UPDATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS UPDATE_DATE, FOLDER.CREATE_NAME1 AS CREATE_NAME1, FOLDER.CREATE_NAME1 AS CREATE_NAME2, "" AS FILE_FOLDER_ID, FOLDER.FOLDER_UPPER as FOLDER_UPPER FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER WHERE FOLDER_PATH LIKE CONCAT(#folderPath#, '%') AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId#

SELECT COUNT(RESULT.TARGET_NAME) COUNT FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT FOLDER.FOLDER_NAME1 AS TARGET_NAME, CONCAT('D_', FOLDER.FOLDER_TYPE) AS TARGET_TYPE, 'folder' AS TARGET_EXT, FOLDER.CREATE_NAME1, FOLDER.CREATE_NAME2, DATE_ADD(FAVOR.CREATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS CREATE_DATE FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FAVOR AS FAVOR INNER JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILETYPE AS FILE_TYPE ON FILE_TYPE.TYPE_NAME = 'folder' INNER JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER AS FOLDER ON FOLDER.FOLDER_ID = FAVOR.TARGET_ID AND FOLDER.TENANT_ID = FAVOR.TENANT_ID WHERE FAVOR.TARGET_TYPE = 'D' AND FAVOR.USER_ID = #userId# AND FAVOR.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND FOLDER.USE_STATUS = 'Y' ) AS RESULT WHERE RESULT.TARGET_EXT LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchExt#, '%') AND RESULT.TARGET_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchFileName#, '%') AND RESULT.CREATE_NAME1 LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchCreatorName#, '%') AND RESULT.TARGET_TYPE LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchFileType#, '%')

SELECT COUNT(RESULT.TARGET_NAME) COUNT FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT FILES.FILE_NAME AS TARGET_NAME, FAVOR.TARGET_TYPE AS TARGET_TYPE, FILES.FILE_EXT AS TARGET_EXT, FILES.CREATE_NAME1, FILES.CREATE_NAME2, DATE_ADD(FAVOR.CREATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS CREATE_DATE FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FAVOR AS FAVOR INNER JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE AS FILES ON FILES.FILE_ID = FAVOR.TARGET_ID AND FILES.TENANT_ID = FAVOR.TENANT_ID INNER JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER FOLDER ON FOLDER.FOLDER_ID = FILES.FOLDER_ID INNER JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILETYPE as FILE_TYPE ON FILE_TYPE.TYPE_ID = FILES.TYPE_ID WHERE FAVOR.TARGET_TYPE = 'F' AND FAVOR.USER_ID = #userId# AND FAVOR.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND FILES.USE_STATUS = 'Y'
) AS RESULT WHERE RESULT.TARGET_EXT LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchExt#, '%') AND RESULT.TARGET_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchFileName#, '%') AND RESULT.CREATE_NAME1 LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchCreatorName#, '%') AND RESULT.TARGET_TYPE LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchFileType#, '%')

SELECT COUNT(FAVOR.TARGET_ID) COUNT FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FAVOR AS FAVOR WHERE FAVOR.TARGET_ID = #targetId# AND FAVOR.TARGET_TYPE = #targetType# AND FAVOR.USER_ID = #userId# AND FAVOR.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FAVOR WHERE TARGET_ID = #targetId# AND TARGET_TYPE = #targetType# AND USER_ID = #userId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
